summary: Sprint 5 frontend testing complete. CareerTree component fully verified on desktop (1440x800) and mobile (390x844). All accordion interactions, font styles, image loading, and mobile drawer behavior confirmed working.

issues: Footer text wraps to two lines on 390px - minor display concern but readable

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 5 fully passing. CareerTree component at /app/frontend/src/components/CareerTree.jsx with 5 folders (signoz/thrivestack/lemiride/surrey_uni/pratham). Desktop testids: career-tree, tree-btn-{id}, tree-detail-{id}, tree-entry-{id}-{section}. Mobile testids: career-tree-mobile, tree-btn-mobile-{id}, tree-detail-mobile-{id}. All accordion, font, image, and mobile drawer tests pass.
